description: claudemux idle-signal: on every Stop event, touch /tmp/claude-idle/<session_id> so that `tm wait-idle <repo>` can block until a teammate finishes a turn. The hook fires for every Claude Code session (including the dispatcher itself); nothing waits on the dispatcher's own idle file, so the extra touch is harmless.

hooks.command: input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); [ -n "$sid" ] && { mkdir -p /tmp/claude-idle && touch "/tmp/claude-idle/$sid"; } ; exit 0
